title: 祭囃子に願いを乗せて

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So that's what a ceremonial dance looks like...
My, it's so dazzling.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Truly, a wonderful dance full of grace and
charm...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We should all get out there and do the
ceremonial dance ourselves! Ooh, let's do a
mambo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow, how radical! That could work... I guess?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It won't. El, I hope you plan to do the proper dance, yes?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Claro, claro... I remember how to do it, I swear...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Let's hammer this into our heads,
Nature!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm? You don't wanna dance or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, I wouldn't say that... It's just that this dance is
way out of my league.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Imagine how strange I'd look in such a dazzling
dance.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Fleetfoot Festival is for all Umamusume to
attend... Everyone there has the capacity to shine
on that stage.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Really! That's why we've gotta work hard to step
up! Ei, ei, mun!
